seoTitle: Nanson vs Napier — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Nanson and Napier. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Nanson and Napier.
heading: Nanson vs Napier — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Nanson, Western Australia and Napier, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Nanson has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Napier (30/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Nanson or Napier safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Nanson has a flood risk score of 40/100, while Napier scores 23/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Nanson scores 31/100 for bushfire risk. Napier scores 30/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Nanson or Napier?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Nanson has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
